```{r}
#| label: packages
#| echo: false

source("./meta.R")
```

# Note {.unnumbered}

This book has been "in progress" for well over 10 years and it will continue to
be worked on every once in a while. The directory
<https://www.github.com/deleeuw/gifi_quarto> has the current pdf version, the
bib files, the qmd files with the code chunks, the tex file, and the R and C
source code. Suggestions for improvement of text and code are always welcome.
All text and code are in the public domain and can be copied, modfied, and used
by anybody in any way they like. Attribution will be appreciated, but is not
required.

Just as an aside: "above" in the text refers to anything that comes earlier in
the book and "below" refers to anything that comes later. This always confuses
me, so I had to write it down. I also number *all* displayed equations.
Equations are displayed if and only if they are important, are referred to in
the text, or mess up the line spacing.
